title: Timeline provider skeleton with placeholder and snapshot
description: Create the AppIntentTimelineProvider struct in AggregatorWidget/Provider.swift conforming to AppIntentTimelineProvider<ContentSourceIntent>. Implement placeholder(in:) returning a redacted/skeleton WidgetEntry, and snapshot(for:in:) returning a hard-coded sample entry with bundled sample data and no network call (used by the widget gallery preview). Define the WidgetEntry type with fields for the content item, prepared hero UIImage, deep-link URL, and widget state.
acceptance_criteria: Provider struct compiles conforming to AppIntentTimelineProvider
WidgetEntry carries item data, prepared image, deep-link URL, and a state enum
placeholder returns a low-fidelity skeleton entry with .isPlaceholder true or redacted modifier
snapshot returns hard-coded sample data; zero network calls made during snapshot
